[cron:35f7b151-f2a9-4b40-87da-d40efa2910ba s2-coordination] Read Z:\WEBSITES\DCG.CO\.vsm\POLICY.md. Read Z:\WEBSITES\DCG.CO\.vsm\ACTIVE.md. For each slot with status in-progress, write a lock entry to Z:\WEBSITES\DCG.CO\.vsm\LOCKS.md with the file, worker, time, and expiry 20 minutes from now. Remove any locks older than 20 minutes. Remove locks for slots marked done or failed. If two slots target the same file, clear the lower priority slot and log the conflict. No git.
Current time: Tuesday, March 3rd, 2026 — 10:43 PM (America/Los_Angeles)

Return your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.
